name: openleaf-extension
description: AI-powered citation search and paper review for Overleaf
author: Gaurav Sahu

scripts.dev: npm run build && chokidar 'src/**/*' -c 'npm run build:fast'
scripts.build:fast: rm -rf dist && ENTRY=background vite build && ENTRY=content vite build && ENTRY=options vite build && ENTRY=page-bridge vite build
